'''nadawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olamine|olamine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olamine|olamine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nadawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædæwæth|nædæwæth]] || [[word:nædæwæj|nædæwæj]] || [[word:nædæwæsh|nædæwæsh]] || [[word:nædæwæ|nædæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadadawath|nadadawath]] || [[word:nadadawaj|nadadawaj]] || [[word:nadadawash|nadadawash]] || [[word:nadadawa|nadadawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadawath|nadawath]] || [[word:nadawaj|nadawaj]] || [[word:nadawash|nadawash]] || [[word:nadawa|nadawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadafwath|nadafwath]] || [[word:nadafwaj|nadafwaj]] || [[word:nadafwash|nadafwash]] || [[word:nadafwaf|nadafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nadawatha|nadawatha]] || [[word:nadawaja|nadawaja]] || [[word:nadawasha|nadawasha]] || [[word:nadawaka|nadawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nadawath|nadawath]] || [[word:nadawaj|nadawaj]] || [[word:nadawash|nadawash]] || [[word:nadawa|nadawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nadawathal|nadawathal]] || [[word:nadawajal|nadawajal]] || [[word:nadawashal|nadawashal]] || [[word:nadawakal|nadawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nadawathatha|nadawathatha]] || [[word:nadawajaja|nadawajaja]] || [[word:nadawashasha|nadawashasha]] || [[word:nadawaka|nadawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nadawathan|nadawathan]] || [[word:nadawajan|nadawajan]] || [[word:nadawashan|nadawashan]] || [[word:nadawakan|nadawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nadawathaoro|nadawathaoro]] || [[word:nadawajaoro|nadawajaoro]] || [[word:nadawashaoro|nadawashaoro]] || [[word:nadawakaoro|nadawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
